name.full: Org User Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: Route each Copilot Cowork task to the cheapest capable option.
description.full: A cost-governance toolkit for end users of M365 Copilot Cowork. copilot-cost-advisor routes each task to the cheapest capable option at task time: the licence-included Copilot Chat + Work IQ (mail, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive) and built-in Office apps + Copilot cost nothing per run, while a metered Cowork run burns credits. It judges in one pass — cheap lookups get a 'use Chat next time' nudge, expensive but divertible artifacts get a pre-tip to use PowerPoint/Excel/Word + Copilot first, and tasks only Cowork can do proceed untouched. Near-zero overhead: no tool calls, no file reads, no deliberation. Prevent spend at task time, before credits are burned.
